description: Face-form combinations: eye shape + eye size + mouth line + canvas resolution + baseline glow intensity. Expert board: Disney/Pixar silhouette-first readability (round=warm, angular=sharp, narrow=mask-like), Munari minimalism (can the face survive at 48×48?). Engine today honors glow_intensity directly; the other fields are stored for future renderer work and for agent self-description. Agent picks one.

face_styles.label: Pixel Crisp
face_styles.summary: High-contrast retro-game feel. Sharp edges, max glow.

face_styles.label: Sleepy Soft
face_styles.summary: Large eyes, soft mouth, low glow. Reads as gentle/drowsy.

face_styles.label: Minimal Dot
face_styles.summary: Pared-down glyph. Small eyes, minimal mouth, lower resolution. Zen.

face_styles.label: Oval Theatrical
face_styles.summary: Tall eyes, wide mouth. Expressive, stage-sized.

face_styles.label: Spectral Glow
face_styles.summary: Max glow ghost. Translucent, radiant, unearthly.

face_styles.label: Carved Mask
face_styles.summary: Narrow eyes, flat mouth. Noh/Kabuki stylized stillness.
